description: Apr 21 2026 feedback fixtures replayed through the agent-feedback pipeline to validate classification + upgrade_guidance assignment against real content. Derived from Simon's agent-shape and CLI friction reports; each entry SHOULD classify as duplicate_of_shipped_work with a fully-populated upgrade_guidance block on v0.5.0.

submissions.title: Add store --plan so I can preview without persisting
submissions.body: For agentic use I want a `store --plan` dry-run that returns the resolver_path + action + projected snapshot for each entity without persisting. Today I have to speculatively store and then delete.

submissions.title: Add store --strict so silent merges fail loudly
submissions.body: The default merge-on-match behavior hides bugs. I want `store --strict` to refuse to silently merge and surface the match candidate instead.

submissions.title: Return entity_snapshot_after + resolver_path + action from store
submissions.body: Agents need the post-store state back in the response to chain operations deterministically. Today we re-query which is racy.

submissions.title: Dedicated neotoma ingest verb
submissions.body: Ingesting a file feels wrong under `store`; want a dedicated `neotoma ingest` verb that carries file + parse semantics.

submissions.title: Add NEOTOMA_BASE_URL and NEOTOMA_API_ONLY env vars
submissions.body: Need to route the CLI through a remote API when SQLite is not present. Today I rely on local-file defaults.

submissions.title: searchable_fields for schema-driven identifier lookup
submissions.body: retrieve_entity_by_identifier should fall back across schema-declared searchable_fields (name, aliases, etc).

submissions.title: Expose list_recent_changes across core tables
submissions.body: Agents want a single call that returns the most recent activity across entities/sources/observations/interpretations/relationships/timeline_events.

submissions.title: Surface CanonicalNameUnresolvedError with actionable hint
submissions.body: When the store path cannot derive a canonical name, the error message should point to the fields / schema knobs that would fix it.

submissions.title: Ship list_potential_duplicates / find-duplicates
submissions.body: Want a dedicated duplicate-detection surface rather than re-doing this per entity_type.

submissions.title: include_observations on retrieve_entity_by_identifier
submissions.body: I want to fold the observation fetch into the identifier lookup to save a round-trip.

submissions.title: --since / updated_since filters for retrieve_entities
submissions.body: Filter by last-change timestamps to build incremental sync loops.
